name: DeepSeek-V3.1
tagline: First hybrid model combining thinking and non-thinking modes in one checkpoint, with improved reasoning efficiency.
metaDescription: DeepSeek-V3.1 (DeepSeek), released 2025-08-21 — part of the DeepSeek V3 line. First hybrid model combining thinking and non-thinking modes in one checkpoint, w…
overview: DeepSeek-V3.1 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek V3 line. Released 2025-08-21. General-purpose open-weight MoE line (671B/685B total, ~37B active) that introduced sparse-attention efficiency and hybrid thinking/non-thinking modes; predecessor to V4.
What's notable in this version: First hybrid model combining thinking and non-thinking modes in one checkpoint, with improved reasoning efficiency.
